name: 국립중앙박물관
description: 한국의 대표 국립 박물관. 상설전시는 무료이며 특별전은 별도 요금이 있을 수 있음.
free_entry_day: Always free for permanent exhibitions
special_discount: Special exhibitions may charge separate admission.

name: 서울역사박물관
description: 서울의 도시사와 생활사를 다루는 공립 역사박물관.
free_entry_day: Always free
special_discount: Always Free.

name: 국립현대미술관 서울관
description: 서울 도심의 국립 현대미술관. 전시별 요금이 달라질 수 있음.
free_entry_day: Wednesday and Saturday 18:00-21:00; Culture Day
special_discount: Base price uses integrated/regular exhibition ticket; exact fee can vary by exhibition. Under 24, over 65, disabled visitors and certain public-benefit groups may be free.

name: 리움미술관
description: 한국 고유의 미를 담고 있는 전통미술과 생동하는 현대미술, 시대적 가치를 반영한 국제미술이 함께 공존하는 세계를 향한 열린 미술관
free_entry_day: Exhibitions vary.
special_discount: Special exhibitions or experience programs may charge.

name: 덕수궁
description: 서울 도심의 조선 궁궐. 야간까지 개방되어 접근성이 좋은 궁궐 관광지.
free_entry_day: Culture Day; hanbok admission free
special_discount: Korean palace free-entry rules apply to seniors, certain veterans, disabled visitors and hanbok visitors.

name: 창덕궁
description: 유네스코 세계유산으로 지정된 조선 궁궐. 후원 관람은 별도 요금/예약이 필요할 수 있음.
free_entry_day: Culture Day; hanbok admission free
special_discount: Secret Garden ticket is not included in the base palace ticket. Seasonal hours are simplified in opening_hours.csv.

name: 경복궁
description: 조선 왕조의 대표 궁궐. 계절별 운영시간이 달라짐.
free_entry_day: Culture Day; hanbok admission free
special_discount: Seasonal hours are simplified to the current summer schedule in opening_hours.csv.

name: 서울공예박물관
description: 공예와 디자인 문화를 다루는 서울시립 박물관.
free_entry_day: Always free for permanent exhibitions
special_discount: Special programs or temporary exhibitions may require reservation or fee.

name: 서울시립 사진미술관
description: 사진 중심의 전시와 다채로운 프로그램.
free_entry_day: Free except selected special exhibitions
special_discount: Admission fee can vary by exhibition.

name: 서울시립 남서울미술관
description: 역사의 정취가 가득한, 오래 머물고 싶은 미술관입니다. 미술관이 둥지를 튼 이곳은 대한제국(1897~1910) 시절 벨기에 영사관으로 사용된 건물(사적 제254호)로, 1905년 회현동에 준공되어 1983년 지금의 남현동으로 옮겨졌습니다.
free_entry_day: Free except selected special exhibitions
special_discount: Admission fee can vary by exhibition.

name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
description: 뉴욕을 대표하는 대형 미술관. Fifth Avenue 본관 기준.
free_entry_day: Pay-what-you-wish for NY State residents and NY/NJ/CT students
special_discount: Children under 12 free. Visitors with disabilities receive reduced admission and one care partner may be free.

name: MoMA
description: 현대미술 중심의 뉴욕 대표 미술관.
free_entry_day: Children 16 and under free; free-entry programs may vary
special_discount: Visitors with disabilities receive reduced admission and one care partner may be free.

name: Guggenheim Museum
description: 프랭크 로이드 라이트 건축으로 유명한 현대미술관.
free_entry_day: Pay-What-You-Wish during selected hours
special_discount: Children under 12 free. Visitors with disabilities and seniors/students receive reduced admission.

name: American Museum of Natural History
description: 자연사, 우주, 생물 다양성 전시를 갖춘 대형 박물관.
free_entry_day: Pay-what-you-wish for NY/NJ/CT residents
special_discount: Children under 3 may be free. Visitors with disabilities may be eligible for reduced onsite admission.

name: Whitney Museum
description: 미국 현대미술과 동시대 미술에 특화된 미술관.
free_entry_day: Free Friday evenings; Free Second Sundays; visitors 25 and under free
special_discount: Free/discount programs are subject to calendar and ticket availability.

name: The Frick Collection
description: 유럽 회화와 장식미술 컬렉션으로 유명한 미술관.
free_entry_day: Pay-what-you-wish Wednesdays during selected afternoon hours
special_discount: Youth 10-18 may be free; children under 10 are generally not admitted.

name: Intrepid Museum
description: 항공모함 Intrepid, 우주왕복선, 잠수함 전시가 있는 해양·항공·군사 박물관.
free_entry_day: Selected complimentary-admission programs may apply
special_discount: Prices should be checked against the ticket calendar; access caregiver may be free.

name: Museum of the City of New York
description: 뉴욕시의 역사와 도시문화를 다루는 박물관.
free_entry_day: Wednesdays free; NYC residents pay what they can
special_discount: Visitors 18 and under may be free. Personal care assistants may be free.

name: Brooklyn Museum
description: 브루클린의 대표 미술관. 고대부터 현대미술까지 폭넓은 컬렉션을 보유.
free_entry_day: Pay what you can at admission desk
special_discount: Ages 4-19 may be free. Visitors with disabilities and seniors/students receive suggested reduced admission.

name: 9/11 Memorial Museum
description: 9·11 테러 추모와 관련 기록을 다루는 박물관. 메모리얼 광장은 무료.
free_entry_day: Memorial free daily; New York First Sundays program for eligible NY community
special_discount: Museum ticket prices can vary by date and ticket type; official calendar should be checked.

name: Louvre Museum
description: 세계 최대 규모의 미술관 중 하나. 2026년 요금은 거주지/자격에 따라 달라짐.
free_entry_day: First Friday after 18:00 except July/August; 14 July; under 18 and EEA under 26 free
special_discount: Base adult price uses non-EEA visitor rate; EEA adult visitor rate may be lower.

name: Mus?e d’Orsay
description: 오르세 역사를 개조한 미술관. 인상주의 컬렉션으로 유명함.
free_entry_day: Under 18 and EEA under 26 free; selected free-entry days may require booking
special_discount: Reduced onsite ticket used for student_price where applicable; eligibility must be verified.

name: Centre Pompidou
description: 퐁피두센터 본관. 2025년 가을부터 대규모 리노베이션으로 본관 폐쇄 상태.
free_entry_day: Main building closed; off-site programs vary
special_discount: Do not use this row for admission-fee comparison unless filtering closed facilities.

name: Mus?e Rodin
description: 로댕 조각과 정원을 중심으로 한 미술관.
free_entry_day: First Sunday from October to March; under 18 and EEA under 26 free
special_discount: Eligibility for free or reduced admission must be verified with ID.

name: Mus?e de l’Orangerie
description: 모네의 수련 연작으로 유명한 튈르리 정원의 미술관.
free_entry_day: Under 18 and EEA under 26 free; selected free-entry days may require booking
special_discount: Friday night reduced tickets may apply during exhibition periods.

name: Palais de Tokyo
description: 대규모 현대미술 전시 공간. 목요일 자정까지 운영되는 야간 접근성이 특징.
free_entry_day: Under 18 and selected beneficiaries free
special_discount: Reduced fee applies to 18-25, students and seniors over 60; disabled visitor and companion free.

name: Mus?e Picasso
description: 파블로 피카소의 작품과 기록을 소장한 마레 지구의 미술관.
free_entry_day: First Sunday of the month; under 18 and EEA under 26 free
special_discount: Eligibility for reduced/free admission must be verified.

name: Mus?e Carnavalet
description: 파리의 도시 역사와 생활사를 다루는 박물관. 상설 컬렉션은 무료.
free_entry_day: Permanent collections free
special_discount: Temporary exhibitions may charge.

name: Cit? des Sciences
description: 라 빌레트 공원의 과학산업 박물관. 전시, 어린이관, 플라네타리움 등 공간별 시간이 다를 수 있음.
free_entry_day: Under 2 free; disabled visitor and companion free
special_discount: Base price uses exhibition ticket. Cit? des enfants and G?ode have separate formulas/prices.

name: Arc de Triomphe
description: 샹젤리제 서쪽 끝의 기념물. 전망대 입장권 기준.
free_entry_day: Tomb of the Unknown Soldier free; under 18 and EU/EEA under 26 free for monument access
special_discount: Opening hours are seasonal. Monument may close for ceremonies or weather.
